text: my app just like... doesn't work, you know? it was fine before, but now it's just... spinning and nothing happens? also, I have a cat and it’s really cute, but can you fix my app? thanks!
Hey, I'm just wondering if the pro plan is billed like, each month or is it like yearly? I'm kinda confused and really want to make sure before I subscribe. Thanks!
Hey, I accidentally paid too much for my subscription. Can you help me get a refund?
hey, my login not working right now, tried reset but no email? help!

Hey, so I was using the app to upload my files and it just stopped halfway through. I tried again but it’s like it’s on strike or something! The pizza I ordered is probably getting cold while I wait for this to work. Can you help?

I've been experiencing a lot of issues with my subscription lately, and despite reaching out multiple times, I still haven't received the services I paid for. It's really frustrating as I expected better support and resolution. Can someone please look into this?

I was wondering if you could provide me with more information about how your subscription service works, especially when it comes to the billing cycle and whether there are any hidden fees that I might not be aware of. It feels a bit complicated and I can't find the details anywhere on your site.

Hello, I’m having some issues with my account. It seems like I can’t log in, and when I try to reset my password, it doesn’t send me the email. I’ve checked spam folders and everything. This is very frustrating, could you please help me figure this out? Thanks!

I just wanted to express my frustration with the service I received recently. First, it took forever to get a response, and when I finally did, the explanation was so vague that it left me even more confused. I mentioned my issue with the product, but the representative kept bringing up unrelated details that had nothing to do with my situation, like their lunch hours and what I should do if I encounter future problems, which really didn’t help at all. I expected a much more direct approach considering how much I rely on your services for my business. Please look into this as I’m quite disappointed and hope this can be addressed soon.

Dear support team, I am encountering a persistent issue when attempting to proceed with checkout on your website. The page fails to load completely, and I am unable to complete my purchase. Thank you for your assistance.
can't log in. my email is wrong. how to fix?
I'm really frustrated! The app crashes every time I try to upload a photo. Please help!

Hey there, I think I might have messed up my log-in details for my account, like I can't seem to remember the password I set up, and I tried all the usual ones, but no luck! Can you help me get back in? Thanks a bunch!
I was just wondering if you guys could tell me how I can get my favorite snack delivered faster? It really makes my day when I have it, and I sometimes feel sad waiting too long. Thanks!
Can you tell me if my order from last week includes a free gift? Also, is the weather nice there?

Dear Customer Support, I am writing to request a refund for my recent purchase as the item did not meet my expectations. Additionally, I would like to mention that the packaging was not up to the standard I anticipated, which further contributed to my disappointment. Thank you for addressing this matter promptly.
